name: Smoked Burrata & Heirloom Tomatoes
description: Cold-smoked burrata on heirloom tomatoes, drizzled with aged balsamic and basil oil.

name: Crispy Polenta Bites
description: Golden polenta cubes with whipped ricotta, sun-dried tomato tapenade, and fresh micro herbs.

name: Charred Prawn Skewers
description: Tiger prawns in chilli butter, flash-grilled over open flame, served with mango aioli.

name: Saffron Lobster Risotto
description: Arborio rice in lobster bisque, topped with grilled lobster tail and saffron foam.

name: Wild Mushroom Wellington
description: Forest mushroom duxelles in puff pastry with truffle jus and roasted root vegetables.

name: Slow-Braised Short Rib
description: 48-hour braised beef short rib with smoky chipotle glaze, creamed mash, and pickled slaw.

name: Ember-Kissed Ribeye
description: 28-day dry-aged 300g ribeye over wood ember, with bone marrow butter and house jus.

name: Spatchcock Lemon Herb Chicken
description: Free-range chicken basted in preserved lemon and herb butter. Served with chimichurri.

name: Grilled Cauliflower Steak
description: Whole cauliflower with harissa yogurt, pomegranate, toasted pine nuts, and fresh mint.

name: Salted Caramel Lava Cake
description: Dark chocolate fondant with molten salted caramel centre and vanilla bean gelato.

name: Yuzu Panna Cotta
description: Silky yuzu panna cotta with blood orange compote and white chocolate shards.

name: Ash & Honey Cheesecake
description: Baked cheesecake with activated charcoal crust, raw honey drizzle, and candied walnuts.

name: Ember Smoked Negroni
description: Classic Negroni finished with applewood smoke, served in a theatrical smoke-filled glass.

name: Charcoal Lemonade
description: Cold-pressed lemonade with activated charcoal, ginger, and a float of rose water.

name: Gold Turmeric Latte
description: Golden milk with turmeric, oat milk, cardamom, and black pepper. Warm or iced.
